author: Camilo-Lesmes
text:
Actualmente la librería trabaja con Python3, prueba creando un entorno y prueba nuevamente

> sudo apt-get install python3-venv -y

author: bdferris642
text:
I have had the same problem on both 1.2 and 1.1  
Errors out on:  
logger.info(f"Got user information from username {user}")  
with a syntax error

author: bdferris642
text:
I solved this problem by downgrading to 1.1 and creating a new virtualenv that uses python 3.6  
f-strings (for example: f"Got user information from username {user}") are not a thing in python 3.5

author: taspinar
text: This issue should be fixed in version 1.3.1 where the two uses of f-strings have been replaced with string.format()
